query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `markets` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `markets_name_unique` (`name`)
);

ALTER TABLE `users`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `title` varchar(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reportsToId` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `marketId` int,
  ADD CONSTRAINT `users_marketId_markets_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`marketId`) REFERENCES `markets` (`id`);
